name: Chocolate Creams
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk egg yolks and sugar in a bowl for a few minutes.
2. Mix milk, shredded chocolate, and cocoa in a pot; bring to a boil.
3. Gradually add the hot milk mixture to the eggs while stirring constantly.
4. Pour the egg mixture back into the pot; heat while stirring until it begins to thicken.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
6. Dissolve gelatine in 2 dl boiling water (0.2 c); squeeze out any excess liquid.
7. Stir the dissolved gelatine into the cooled mixture.
8. Whip the cream until stiff peaks form.
9. Pour the chocolate mix into a greased mold; tap to remove air bubbles.
10. Refrigerate for 3-4 hours, then loosen sides with a knife and invert the mold onto a serving plate.
